title: Koine template manifest
description: Metadata for a Koine example-domain template. One template.json sits next to the template's .koi source files. The template id must equal its folder name, and entryFile must name a .koi file present in the folder.

id.description: Stable identifier for the template. MUST equal the template's folder name.

tagline.description: One-line summary shown in template listings.

description.description: A paragraph describing what the template models and demonstrates.

difficulty.description: Relative complexity, used to order and badge templates.

tags.description: Free-form keywords for search and filtering.

contexts.description: Names of the bounded contexts the template defines.

coreAggregate.description: The declared aggregate that anchors the template — its name, e.g. "Sales" for `aggregate Sales root Order`. For a template that declares no aggregate, the headline entity instead. Must name a real aggregate (or, when none is declared, a real entity) in the compiled model — enforced by TemplatesValidationTests.

entryFile.description: The primary .koi file to open first. MUST name a file present in the template folder.

teaches.description: The Koine concepts or DDD patterns a learner picks up from this template.

icon.description: An icon identifier (e.g. an emoji or icon name) for the template card.
